<svg width="400" height="350">
  <!-- Black Background -->
  <rect x="0%" y="0%" width="%100" height="%100" fill="#000"/>
  
  <!-- Flower Center -->
  <circle cx="278px" cy="269px" r="30px" stroke-width="2"
          style="-webkit-fill-rule:evenodd; clip-path:url(#clipPath)" 
           fill="#fff"/>

  <!-- Petals of the Red Part -->
  <path d="
    M278px -10px L278px 10px C278px 20px 278px 30px 278px 40px Q278px 50px 278px 60px T278px 70px Z;
    M278px -10px A10px 10px 0deg 1 0 278px 10px;" 
        transform="rotate(0 278px 269px)"
         fill="#ff0000"/>;
        
   ... Repeat this pattern around to form petals.
   
</svg>

<svg width="400" height="350">
  <!-- Black Background -->
  <rect x="0%" y="0%" width="%100" height="%100"
        fill="#282D36"/>
  
  <!-- Flower Center -->
  <circle cx="70%px" cy="90%px" r="20%"
          stroke="#FFB6C1" 
          stroke-width="2" 
          opacity=".8"/>

  <!-- Petals of the Red Part -->
  <path d="
    M 70%,90%
      L 70%,100%
      A 30%,30% 0 0 1 70%,130%

      C 70%,130% 70%,130% 70+,130+ % 

      Q 70 + ,130+% 70 +,130+
      
      T 70 +% 130 %+"

         transform="rotate(0deg)"
         style="fill:#ff4b4f;stroke:none;"
         id="petal-rotated">

   </path>

</svg>

<svg width="400" height="350">
  <!-- Black Background -->
  <rect x="0%" y="-12px"
        width="%width%"
        height="%height%+76pt"
        fill="#000"/>
  
  <!-- Flower Center - Red Circle -->
  <circle cx="89%" cy="100%"
          r="20%"
          stroke-width="2"
          style="
            stroke:#ff0000;
            opacity:.8;"
          />
    
    <!-- Petals of the Flower in White -->
      <path d="M89%,100%
                A20%,20%
              Q90%,100%
                    90%,100%
                  C90%,100%
                        90%,100%
                      L90%,100%
                            M90%,100%
                              R-20° 
                                P=Q(90%,100%) 
                                  T(-20°)
                                    Z; "
                          transform="rotate(%angle_around_center_) %center_x_,_%center_y_
                                      translate(0,-20)"
                           fill="#fff"/> 

   </svg>

<svg width="400" height="350">
  <!-- Black Background -->
  <rect x="0%" y="0%" width="%100" height="%100" fill="#262A3C"/>
  
  <!-- Flower Base Circle -->
  <circle cx="78%9/2" cy="78%9/2" r="78%9/2-20px"
          stroke="#FFFFFF" 
          style="-webkit-fill-rule:solid;fill:none;"
          transform="translate(78%,9%) rotate(-90deg)" />
    
    <!-- Petals of the Red Center -->
      <path d="
        M 78%9/2 -20px C 78%9/2 +20px , 78%9/2+20px,
            78%9/2+20px , 78%9/2+20px ,
            78%9/2+20px , 78%9/2+20px "
           fill="#FFD700"/> 

     <!-- White Outer Layer -->
       <g>
         <ellipse rx="78%9/2-20px" ry="78%9/2-20px" 
                  opacity=".8" 
                 fill-opacity=".8"> </ellipse>

             <!-- Add more petals to create depth-->
              <line x1="78%9/2" y1="78%9/2-20px" x2="78%9/2+20px" y2="78%9/2+20px"
                    stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" />   
                </g>
</svg>

<svg width="400" height="350">
  <!-- Black Background -->
  <rect x="-200px" y="-175px" width="800px" height="600px"
        fill="#000"/>
  
  <!-- Flower Structure -->
  <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="90" 
          stroke-width="4" transform-origin="center center"
          style="
            -webkit-transform: rotate(45deg);
            transition-timing-function: ease-in-out;
            animation-name: bloomRotate;    
          " />
          
    <!-- Petals of the Red Center -->
      <g>
        	<!-- White petals around the central core -->        
           <path d="M-80,-80 Q-100,-100 -120,-80 L-100,-60 Z M-80,-80 Q-100,-100 -120,-80 L-100,-60 Z"   
               fill-opacity=".8" opacity="" 
              transform="translate(-100,-100)" />            
           
       </g>

     <!-- Stem & Leaves -->
   <line x1="-100" y1="100" x2="100" y2="100" 
         stroke-linecap="round" stroke-width="10" 
         stroke="#FFD700"/> 

</svg>
